input.name: image
input.semantic: RGB image tensor resized to model input space

outputs.name: raw_boxes
outputs.semantic: xyxy pixel coordinates in 320x320 model input space

outputs.name: raw_scores
outputs.semantic: per-class detector scores for each anchor

notes: The Core AI asset intentionally emits raw detector tensors instead of final detections.
Swift selects the best class per anchor, applies the confidence threshold, converts xyxy pixels into normalized CGRect values, and runs class-aware NMS.
